docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, COLLEEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST COLLEEN WONG, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-06-2007 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-21-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR# 7156. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2008 CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JAN-22-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST COLLEEN WONG, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-24-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-08-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR#5162. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-23-2008 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: TRINA AYALA, CSR#12964. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To Jun-23-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/23/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. (212)
